channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Huge pile of rubbish at side of phone box junction of Hylton Road and Brookdene Road., 19th March
item.description:
Needs to be removed ASAP because of possibility of vermin. Thank you.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brookdene Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Significant fly tipping near 20 Glenarm Road, 19th March
item.description:
In the alleyway next to Number 20 glenarm Road, there is significant fly tipping of all sorts of large items.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Glenarm Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Long pothole at crossing, 19th March
item.description:
This pothole has been there for at least two months and is getting worse - it is a long crack in the road, about 60cm long and 10 cm deep in places, and it is worsening
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Culverhouse Gardens, Streatham Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole at pedestrian crossing at traffic lights, 19th March
item.description:
There is a pothole at the pedestrian crossing at the traffic lights. It's close to the kerb, in the road, and about 20cm long, and 10 cm deep. It has been there about 3 weeks
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Christchurch Road, Streatham Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Parts of a bedframe, 19th March
item.description:
Parts of a bedframe obstructing the gangway. These have been here for approaching 2 weeks.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Marler Road, Perry Vale, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Opposite 202 Edington Road: black sack of rubbish on pavement., 19th March
item.description:
Second report. First report states “Fixed” but black sack still near to raisedbed. If this cannot be removed, please report back to this effect and I’ll contact RBG to make alternative arrangements. Thank you.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Edington Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole by bus stop, 19th March
item.description:
Pothole

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bridge Road, North End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: FlyTip, 19th March
item.description:
Clothes. Bags wooden pallet dumped in the CarPark area behind Devon Mansions

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 15-28, Tooley Street, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large FlyTip, 19th March
item.description:
Setchell Way SE1 by the bins

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Setchell Way, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bricks and building rubbish corner of green space top of Plum Lane, 19th March
item.description:
Fly tipped builders rubbish.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Plum Lane, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Side of 220 Edington Road: two mattresses., 19th March
item.description:
Mattresses are next to recycling bin.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Edington Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outsisde 19 Pedworth Gardens Dog Fouling, 19th March
item.description:
Dog fouling outside fence at 19 pedworth Gardens and communal walkway. Its targeted happens regularly and I have reported to the police and local SNT please come and clear immediately now as it's also on communal walkway kids and babies play or pass through here there is also a meningitis outbreak so all bacteria from dog fouling needs to be completely cleared away totally with chemicals. Its irresponsible by dog owners put a sign for dog owners clean dog mess of 1000 gbp prosecution enough is enough they constantly do it !

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 19, Pedworth Gardens, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sprayed over permit sofn, 19th March
item.description:
This seems to be happening a lot in lambeth where someone has sprayed over the resident permit parking sign to get out of paying for parking. Can you send someone to repair the sign and also alert the police of this crime? Thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cleaver Street, Kennington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken glass on Tanner Street ( opposite park ), 19th March
item.description:
Broken glass has been left on the street for several days and has not been cleared. It poses a hazard to pedestrians and pets, particularly as it is in a public walking area. Please arrange for it to be removed and the area made safe as soon as possible.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tanner Street, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole on Elmers End Road, junction with Birkbeck Road, 19th March
item.description:
There is a pothole on Elmers End Road, as you enter Birkbeck Road. Several road and pavement defects have been marked for repair, but appears to have been missed? Are the defects marked for repair, if so, when are they scheduled for repair?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elmers End Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytip, just as you enter Birkbeck Road, jw Elmers End Road, 19th March
item.description:
Flytip includes broken glass

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Birkbeck Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti, 19th March
item.description:
Graffiti

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mcleod Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned Car os 4- 6 Hamilton Road, 19th March
item.description:
A car has been abandoned and moved onto the pavement which is blocking the pavement and driveways.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hamilton Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lack of enforcement of red light, 19th March
item.description:
I commute through this junction east-west daily, and see blatant violations of the north-south red light almost every day by motor vehicles, typically driving through several seconds after the light has turned red. Drivers display no fear of being penalised - a permanent red light camera is sorely needed.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Englefield Road, Dalston, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Parking space too close to junction, obscures northbound traffic vision, 19th March
item.description:
Parking spaces on Englefield road are too close to junction here. Parked vehicles obscure the line of sight between northbound traffic waiting at junction and approaching westbound vehicles until they are dangerously close to the junction.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Englefield Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet
